Takaichi’s popularity dips after prioritizing controversial laws
top_signals.summary: Support for Takaichi's government decreased to 53% from 60% in June in an Asahi Shimbun poll, while broadcaster ANN found her popularity fell over 10 points to 49.2%.

top_signals.title: What should sport expect from Andy Burnham and Lisa Nandy?
top_signals.summary: There’s an Evertonian in Downing Street, a Toffee looking to unstick what he calls “40 years of neoliberalism”. But in doing so Andy Burnham has left his constituent buddy and long-term ally Lisa Nandy at DCMS, with the “digital” brief dropped in 2023 returning to 100 Parliament Street.
